name: golang-uber-goleak-dev
title: golang-uber-goleak-dev
description:
goroutine leak detector
This package contains a leak detector library to help avoid
Goroutine leaks.
.
goleak also supports semver releases. It is compatible with Go 1.5+.
.
Instead of checking for leaks at the end of every test, goleak can also
be run at the end of every test package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-uber-goleak-dev because goroutine leak detector.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-uber-goleak-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-uber-goleak-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-uber-goleak-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
